rationale: Educ. Code §33.052 governs school participation in missing child prevention programs. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district or of a private school may participate in missing child prevention and identification programs
_note: Rule text concerns an unrelated subject matter; no conflict with proposed homestead exemption increase.
